nodes.label: Canonical pseudocode from zvf_pipeline_spec.tex.      ``rewards_2d`` is an itera
Yield dict records from a JSON or JSONL file.      Handles three shapes graceful
TRL GRPOTrainer log row.      Expects ``rewards`` (flat list), ``batch_size`` an
TINKER managed-runtime log row.      Expects ``rollouts`` or ``rollout`` list; e
OpenRLHF log row.      Expects per-sample ``reward_score`` and ``prompt_index``
veRL log row.      Expects per-sample entries carrying ``uid`` (group boundary)
